blocks.text: Champions League Week: Bodo/Glimt's Historic Night Looms

Tuesday's Champions League slate is unmissable — but Monday sets the stage. The Miami Open rolls on, and Premier League mid-table action keeps the title race context alive with Arsenal still flying high.
🎾 Miami Open presented by Itaú — Round of 64 action continues at Hard Rock Stadium. Ludvig Åberg meanwhile leads THE PLAYERS Championship at -13.

Tuesday delivers one of Norwegian football's greatest ever nights: Bodo/Glimt face Sporting CP at 18:45 in a level CL second leg. Then Haaland's City host Real Madrid, Arsenal face Leverkusen, and Chelsea meet PSG — all at 21:00.
